Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.settings

Record Class FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.settings.FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal
Record Components:
getter - Supplies the initial value of the property when the tween starts.
toValue - The value to tween the property to.
setter - Consumes the interpolated value on every tween update.
Enclosing class:
FlixelTweenSettings
public static record FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal(@NotNull FloatSupplier getter, float toValue, @NotNull FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal.FlixelTweenPropertyFloatSetter setter) extends Record
A record containing a getter, a target value, and a setter for a property-based tween goal. Unlike FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenVarGoal, this does not rely on reflection; the caller supplies how to read the initial value and how to apply each interpolated step, so setter side-effects fire naturally on every update.

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
